assertions.title: Prisma schema includes CustomView, CustomViewItem, and CustomViewItemTranslation models and generates successfully.

steps.action: Inspect prisma/schema.prisma for required models and enums
steps.expected: CustomView models, CustomLayoutItemType enum values, and Language enum exist
steps.observed: Found Language (VI, EN), CustomLayoutItemType (BACKGROUND_TITLE, IMAGE_TEXT_BLOCK, ICON_TEXT_ROW, BOTTOM_IMAGE_TEXT, TEXT_BLOCK), and models CustomView/CustomViewItem/CustomViewItemTranslation

steps.action: Run npx prisma generate from repo root
steps.expected: Command exits 0 and generates Prisma client
steps.observed: Generated Prisma Client (v6.4.1) to ./node_modules/@prisma/client; process exited with code 0

steps.action: Inspect generated Prisma types for delegates
steps.observed: node_modules/.prisma/client/index.d.ts contains get customView(), get customViewItem(), get customViewItemTranslation()

assertions.title: yarn build succeeds with all new files included.

steps.expected: Build exits 0 with no type/build errors
steps.observed: Build failed during 'Collecting page data' with MODULE_NOT_FOUND for ../chunks/ssr/[turbopack]_runtime.js; exit code 1

steps.expected: Transient issue resolves and build exits 0
steps.observed: Build failed with PageNotFoundError for multiple routes (/api/products, /api/revalidate, /[locale]/blog/[slug], etc.); exit code 1

outputExcerpts: Build error occurred: Failed to collect page data for /api/products

assertions.issues: Build did not complete successfully in this environment across two attempts.

assertions.title: yarn lint reports no new errors from custom view implementation.

steps.action: Run yarn lint from repo root
steps.observed: next lint reported '✔ No ESLint warnings or errors'; process exited with code 0

assertions.title: Custom view TypeScript types match the API contract.

steps.expected: All required enums/interfaces/type union are defined with matching field names/types
steps.observed: CustomLayoutItemType, BackgroundTitleData, ImageTextBlockData, IconTextRowData, BottomImageTextData, TextBlockData, CustomLayoutItemData, CustomLayoutItemTranslation, CustomLayoutItem, and CustomViewResponse are present and match the contract

steps.expected: Types are importable from expected path
steps.observed: Services and view components import from '@/types/custom-view'

assertions.title: Application builds and starts successfully even with no CustomView records in the database.

steps.action: Inspect slug route static param generation
steps.expected: Build path does not require existing CustomView records
steps.observed: generateStaticParams in src/app/[locale]/(main)/[slug]/page.tsx uses getAllProducts only; no custom view prefetch requirement

steps.action: Inspect custom view service no-record behavior
steps.expected: No-record custom view lookup returns null safely
steps.observed: getCustomViewBySlug returns null when db.customView.findUnique() has no match
yarn build failed on both attempts with exit code 1

assertions.issues: Code path is compatible with missing CustomView records, but assertion requires successful build and build failed in this run.

assertions.title: Custom view data is fetched server-side, not via client-side API calls.

steps.action: Inspect dynamic slug page data flow
steps.expected: Server component fetches custom view data before rendering
steps.observed: src/app/[locale]/(main)/[slug]/page.tsx awaits getCustomViewBySlug(slug) and conditionally returns <CustomViewPage />

steps.action: Check custom view page for client-fetch patterns
steps.expected: No client-side useQuery/loading fetch for initial data
steps.observed: No useQuery/use client/fetch/axios matches in src/views/custom-view-page

assertions.title: Unknown item type is silently skipped.

steps.expected: Unknown item type falls through to default case returning null
steps.observed: src/views/custom-view-page/index.tsx has switch(item.type) with default: return null

frictions.description: yarn build produced different failures across two back-to-back attempts (missing turbopack runtime vs PageNotFoundError route modules), reducing reproducibility.
frictions.resolution: Retried build once per command-validation guidance; failures persisted.

summary: Tested 7 assigned assertions: 5 passed, 2 failed (VAL-INFRA-002 and VAL-EDGE-005) due repeated yarn build failures (exit code 1).
